an9.31:1.1:
"Navayime, bhikkhave, anupubbanirodhā. Katame nava? Paṭhamaṁ jhānaṁ samāpannassa kāmasaññā niruddhā hoti; dutiyaṁ jhānaṁ samāpannassa vitakkavicārā niruddhā honti; tatiyaṁ jhānaṁ samāpannassa pīti niruddhā hoti; catutthaṁ jhānaṁ samāpannassa assāsapassāsā niruddhā honti; ākāsānañcāyatanaṁ samāpannassa rūpasaññā niruddhā hoti; viññāṇañcāyatanaṁ samāpannassa ākāsānañcāyatanasaññā niruddhā hoti; ākiñcaññāyatanaṁ samāpannassa viññāṇañcāyatanasaññā niruddhā hoti; nevasaññānāsaññāyatanaṁ samāpannassa ākiñcaññāyatanasaññā niruddhā hoti; saññāvedayitanirodhaṁ samāpannassa saññā ca vedanā ca niruddhā honti.
Ime kho, bhikkhave, nava anupubbanirodhā"ti.
Ekādasamaṁ.
Sattāvāsavaggo tatiyo.
Tiṭhānaṁ khaḷuṅko taṇhā,
Sattapaññā silāyupo;
Dve verā dve āghātāni,
Anupubbanirodhena cāti.
